A bundle of Claude Code extensions — skills, MCP servers, commands, hooks, or agents — packaged as one installable unit.

### Skill vs. plugin vs. marketplace?

A skill is a single instruction set. A plugin bundles multiple skills, MCP servers, or commands. A marketplace is a GitHub repo that distributes many plugins under one registry.
